org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.

Call stacks used in the evaluator.

    HostResult
    CallFlowToOn.on(HostFunReaction reaction)
    Makes a non-tail call HostResult which continues to the handler when the fun call returns the result.
